overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring a continuous walk through rain-soaked urban corridors at night. The journey transitions from warm-lit narrow walkways to teal-lit interior passages before emerging onto a neon-lit city street with heavy rainfall and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian walkway between concrete buildings

events.description: camera turns right corner in the corridor
passing close by a standing NPC on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rain-soaked corridor, turning corners and passing close to walls

notable_agents.action: standing still against the wall as the player passes by

entered.detail: tall textured concrete walls with horizontal lines and weathered surfaces
horizontal metal railings mounted on the walls at waist height
warm yellow accent lights embedded in the walls illuminating the wet surfaces
rain-soaked tiled ground reflecting the warm wall lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, rain-soaked corridor between concrete buildings with warm accent lighting. The player walks forward, turning a corner and passing closely by an NPC standing against the right wall. The environment is enclosed with metal railings lining the walls and wet reflective pavement underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: long straight covered walkway with warm lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a long straight corridor toward a distant light source

entered.detail: extended straight walkway stretching into the distance with vanishing point perspective
massive vertical concrete support columns lining the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking through a long, straight corridor with concrete pillars and warm recessed lighting. The space is empty of people, with the camera moving steadily forward toward a distant glow at the corridor's end. The rain continues to fall in the sheltered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: teal-lit interior corridor with architectural columns

events.description: ambient lighting shifts dramatically from warm yellow to cool teal and cyan tones
corridor opens ahead revealing the exit to the street with warm city lights visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through winding teal-lit corridors, approaching the exit to the outside

entered.detail: cyan and teal colored light fixtures casting cool ambient glow on concrete walls
large structural archways supporting the corridor ceiling
opening at the end of the corridor revealing the city street beyond

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a cool teal and cyan color palette as the player moves through architecturally complex corridors with massive concrete pillars. The lighting is now neon and artificial, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere. The player approaches an exit where warm city lights become visible in the distance, indicating the transition to an exterior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city street with palm trees and parked cars

events.description: exits the covered corridor onto the open city street with heavy rainfall
rain becomes visibly heavier and more exposed as camera moves into open air

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor onto a wet city street, continuing to walk forward into the urban environment

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements including a red Samurai poster and cyan SOFT sign
tall palm trees lining the street, wet from rain
vehicles parked along the curb of the city street
tall city buildings with illuminated windows rising in the background
tall lamp posts casting warm light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the corridor onto a wide, rain-soaked city street lined with palm trees and parked cars. Neon billboards including a prominent Samurai poster illuminate the scene with vibrant colors against the dark night sky. The environment is now fully exposed to the heavy rain, with skyscrapers visible in the background and the wet asphalt reflecting the myriad of city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through rain-soaked urban corridors that transition from warm, enclosed walkways into a vibrant, neon-lit city street. It begins in a narrow concrete passage with warm accent lighting, moving past a lone figure leaning against a wall and along reflective pavement. As the camera advances through a long, straight corridor of concrete pillars, the warm recessed lighting gradually shifts into a cool teal and cyan color palette within a more complex architectural space. The scene then opens as the player approaches a distant glow, emerging from the artificial neon interior onto a wide, rain-drenched boulevard. Finally, the environment expands to reveal a sprawling cityscape of skyscrapers, palm trees, and glowing billboards, including a prominent Samurai poster, all reflecting off the wet asphalt under a heavy downpour.
